issue_title: Fix i18n dropdown typo and a wrong link
issue_body_preview:
<!--
  Hi. If you can see this, thank you very much. Yes. I am talking to you, who is creating a PR to make jest-preview a better library.
  We provide a CONTRIBUTING guide at https://www.jest-preview.com/docs/others/contributing. I hope it helps you when setup and start contribute to jest-preview
test_description_zh: 访问 jest-preview 官方文档网站，检查页面上的国际化（i18n）语言切换下拉菜单中的文字拼写是否正确，并点击相关链接验证其跳转目标是否正确。
expected_result_zh: i18n 语言切换下拉菜单中的选项文字拼写正确，无拼写错误；点击相关链接后应跳转到正确的目标页面，不出现 404 或跳转到错误的页面。
